docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SIMS KEVIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KAKOS ELVIRA $188.60 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $196.60, DEFT ALLOWED $99.16WATER,$65.07 GARBAGE AND $346 H OLDOVER RENT, BALANCE OF $699.83 DEPOSIT IS$188.60 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
